name: CaptivateIQ Knowledge Base
description: Structured knowledge base for building CaptivateIQ solutions. Combines public API reference, implementation patterns from practitioner knowledge, and platform taxonomy from help center structure.

api-reference.json.description: Full CIQ Developer API endpoint reference with schemas and field definitions

implementation-patterns.json.description: CIQ implementation patterns: worksheet naming, data flow, formula capabilities, best practices

platform-taxonomy.json.description: CIQ platform section taxonomy: 16 help center categories, dependencies, build order

categories.description: Per-category article collections scraped from CIQ support site. Requires authenticated access.
